_comment: App-UX attacker/proposer pair (prompts/app-ux-attacker.md, prompts/app-ux-proposer.md). Reuses the generic vibe-app pairing mode. Local `claude -p` for both roles by default (zero setup) — pass --tier frontier|good|open to swap both onto cross-vendor OpenRouter models. Run: `node orchestrate.mjs --config agents.appux.json --task "..."` (or --file). Converges when the attacker's strongest standing finding is at/below --floor (default LOW).
